ValidationRule.description: Fields that are required when the SaaS Onboarding Status is set to 'Postponed'. 11/15/24 PE - Deactived VR to allow reps to edit postponed accounts before the rollout of the new process. Approved by Greta.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e1I000001rqxt'), NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e1I000000qsnN'), OR( ISPICKVAL(SaaS_Onboarding_Status__c,"Postponed"), ISPICKVAL(SaaS_Onboarding_Status__c,"Requesting Postpone - Awaiting Approval") ), OR( ISBLANK(TEXT(SaaS_Postponed_Reason__c)), ISBLANK(SaaS_Postponed_Reason_Detail__c), ISBLANK(SaaS_Postponed_Exit_Date__c), ISBLANK(SaaS_Postponed_Check_In_Date__c), ISBLANK(SaaS_Postponed_Start_Date__c), ISBLANK(Confirmed_Launch_Date__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: SaaS Postponed Reason, SaaS Postponed Reason Detail, SaaS Postponed Start Date, SaaS Postponed Exit Date, Target Launch Date - SaaS, and SaaS Postponed Check-In Date are required when SaaS Onboarding Status is set to 'Postponed'.
